summary: Scan score/tld as sql.NullInt64/NullString; replaced MAX(fetched_at) join with ROW_NUMBER() window for per-fqdn dedup.
reason: (a) Domains looked up via `rdap` (writes rdap_records only) were silently dropped from the timeline because the LEFT JOIN to `domains` produced NULL on score/tld and the plain-int scan errored. (b) Two writes within one second shared fetched_at (1s SQLite resolution), so MAX(fetched_at) matched both rows and the domain appeared twice.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes; rdap-only domains now appear once each in the timeline.
